title: Barbara Townsend launches new novel in Knysna
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Acclaimed South African author...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Acclaimed South African author Barbara Townsend will launch her latest book, The Colour of Flying, in Knysna on Tuesday 21 October.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Acclaimed South African author Barbara Townsend will launch her latest book, The Colour of Flying, in Knysna on Tuesday 21 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Everyone is invited to join the event, to be held at the Methodist Church hall in Montagu Street, Rexford, starting at 18:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Set in 1953, the story follows Missy B, a three-year-old whose world is turned upside down by events that shape her future.","html":"Set in 1953, the story follows Missy B, a three-year-old whose world is turned upside down by events that shape her future."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Through this child's-eye view, Townsend explores themes of love, loss and resilience, blending humour and poignancy in a tale that resonates across generations.","html":"Through this child's-eye view, Townsend explores themes of love, loss and resilience, blending humour and poignancy in a tale that resonates across generations."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Townsend, author of Ida's Line and Out of Mind - A Story of Robben Island, is known for giving voice to those often unheard."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Writer Carmel Rickard calls the book \"a remarkable portrayal of a child's developing consciousness\".","html":"Writer Carmel Rickard calls the book \"a remarkable portrayal of a child's developing consciousness\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event will be introduced by William Charlton-Perkins, with tea and refreshments served. Townsend will also be interviewed at the George Museum on Wednesday 22 October at 11:00. For any enquiries, contact Townsend on 083 315 9211.","html":"The event will be introduced by William Charlton-Perkins, with tea and refreshments served. Townsend will also be interviewed at the George Museum on Wednesday 22 October at 11:00. For any enquiries, contact Townsend on 083 315 9211."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Colour of Flying","html":"The Colour of Flying"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
